blended.narrative: Revelstoke Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,777 ft. Looking ahead, 35 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 48°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.9" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Thursday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 8" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
